activated_rules.rule_name: Koncernstruktur – Consignor får återfinnas i fakturan utöver fakturautställare

Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:

Drottninggatan 21

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'mfiber AB' from the certificate is found in the invoice as 'mFiber AB' including matching address and country Sweden after normalization. The slight difference in case and format is accepted under normalization rules. No other conflicting parties detected. Juridical company name matches with accepted legal form abbreviation difference (rule 4.1.3.6).

consignee.motivation: The consignee 'P.K. MARKETING CO.' in the certificate exactly matches the 'P.K. Marketing Co.' in the invoice in the billing and ship to fields with matching address and country India. Case, punctuation and minor formatting differences are normalized. The consignee is correctly matched to the invoice's billing party as per priority rules.

goods_description.certificate_value:
PAPER IN REELS - in various grammages / widths
Shipped in container(s)
gross weight = net weight
15 reels of Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper
goods_description.invoice_value:
Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper
HS Code: 4804 21
15 Reels
goods_description.motivation: Certificate includes a general goods description with explicit invoice reference (Ref no: INV-000280) and invoice date, enabling acceptance of general goods text with verified link to invoice. The invoice confirms matching product description 'Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper' and quantity '15 Reels', confirming correspondence.

quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity expressed as 'GW/NW: 27586 kg' matches the invoice quantity '15 Reels' (shipment quantity) and weight '27.5860 MT' (metric tons). Weight equivalence verified by unit conversion: 27.5860 MT equals 27,586 kg, matching certificate weight. Shipment quantity of 15 reels supports verification per allowed rules. No contradictions present.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin states 'European Community; Sweden' recognized as EU-related origins. Invoice states 'Sweden' as country of origin. Sweden is an EU member at certificate issue date, matching EU normalization rules. No conflicting non-EU origins are present. China/Hong Kong normalization irrelevant here but accounted for in rules.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points match successfully with explicit normalization and no contradictions. The document pair can be approved automatically.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikat och faktura. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan manuell granskning.
